saṃ-√hṛṣ P. -hṛṣyati (mc. also Ā. ˚te), to bristle, stand erect (as the hair of the body from joy or fright),  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to thrill with delight, be glad, rejoice,  ib.  :
Caus. -harṣayati, to gladden, delight,  R. ;  Divyāv.
